name: Bankruptcy Penalty Relief

eligibility.description: Available to debtors in a pending Title 11 bankruptcy case where the tax was incurred by the estate or incurred by the debtor before the order for relief.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts taxpayers from penalties for failure to pay certain taxes while a Title 11 bankruptcy case is pending, provided the court finds a probable insufficiency of funds for administrative expenses.
